currency.note: KES prices rounded for local market

packages.name: AI Audit
packages.tagline: Find your highest-ROI AI opportunities in 1–2 weeks

deliverables: Current-state assessment (people, data, systems)
Opportunity map (5–10 ranked use cases with ROI model)
Quick-win pilot plan (1 actionable project ready to build)
Make-vs-buy recommendation
Risk + compliance review (data privacy, KENYA DPA 2019, GDPR)
Executive readout + 12-month roadmap

price.note: 50% credited toward any subsequent build package

packages.outcome: A board-ready AI strategy with one pilot ready to ship

1 automation workflow (lead capture, auto-reply, or appointment booking)
Knowledge base setup (chat with your docs — up to 50 documents)
Basic analytics dashboard (queries, resolution rate, popular topics)
Multilingual support (English + Swahili)
2 rounds of revisions + 30 days post-launch support

price.note: Monthly covers hosting, monitoring, prompt tweaks. Cancel anytime.

packages.outcome: Cut customer response time by ~80%, reclaim 10+ hours/week

packages.name: AI Enterprise

Dedicated Slack/Teams channel + named engineer

Quarterly roadmap + executive business reviews

services.name: AI Chatbots & Virtual Assistants

services.description: Extract structured data from invoices, receipts, KRA returns, IDs, contracts. Auto-enter into your CRM/ERP. 95%+ accuracy.

services.name: Computer Vision
services.description: Agricultural disease detection, retail shelf monitoring, quality control, defect detection. On-device or cloud — works offline on low-end phones.

services.name: Predictive Analytics & Forecasting
services.description: Demand forecasting, churn prediction, credit scoring, anomaly detection. Holt-Winters, GARCH, EWMA, VaR — real math, not vibes.

services.name: AI Automation & Workflows
services.description: Connect your CRM, ERP, email, WhatsApp with LLMs and agents. Automate multi-step workflows end-to-end. n8n, Make, custom.

services.name: LLM Fine-Tuning & Customization
services.description: Domain-tuned models (legal, medical, agri, financial). Swahili & local-language adaptation. Brand-voice models. LoRA, QLoRA, int8 quantization.

services.name: Voice AI & Speech
services.description: Voice agents, IVR modernization, meeting transcription, Swahili/Sheng ASR. Call-center copilots that cut average handle time 30%+.

services.description: Swahili-first assistants with dialect awareness. English · Français · Kiswahili · Luganda · Amharic. Built for African markets.

services.name: AI for Agriculture
services.description: Crop disease detection via phone photos, weather/advisory via SMS/WhatsApp/USSD, yield prediction, locust early warning. 22+ verified data sources.

services.description: AI readiness audits, roadmaps, board briefings, team upskilling. Half-day to 5-day workshops for non-technical to technical audiences.

services.description: Inventory + POS analytics, marketing copy generation, review-response automation, bookkeeping assist. Built for micro-SMEs and solo founders.

caseStudies.name: Tapi Learn (ACLA)
caseStudies.tagline: Climate leadership in your pocket — 11K+ learners, 38 countries
caseStudies.description: A free, Africa-built, multilingual mobile learning app for climate leadership. Features expert-led courses, verified certificates, an opportunities board, mentorship, and a 24/7 AI Career Coach.
whatIBuilt: AI Career Coach — 24/7 interactive assistant for CV reviews, interview prep, career advice

caseStudies.name: Busara AI
caseStudies.description: A multi-agent DAG pipeline with 50 specialized agents across 7 stages. Kahn's topological sort, circuit breakers, O(1) LRU caching, real statistical algorithms — Holt-Winters, OLS, K-Means++, GARCH.
whatIBuilt: Real statistical algorithms (not LLM vibes — actual math)
Circuit breakers + smart caching for production reliability

caseStudies.name: KilimoPRO
caseStudies.tagline: AI-powered agricultural intelligence for 5M Kenyan farmers
caseStudies.description: Offline-first mobile app for Kenyan smallholder farmers. On-device crop disease detection (TensorFlow Lite, MobileNetV3, PlantVillage), multi-LLM council for advisory, quant-based price forecasting (EWMA, GARCH, VaR).
whatIBuilt: On-device crop disease detection (TFLite, MobileNetV3, 91% accuracy, <4MB model)
Multi-LLM Council (5 expert personas: agronomist, economist, climate scientist, extension officer, risk manager)
Quant-based price forecasting (EWMA, GARCH(1,1), VaR, RSI)
22+ verified data sources (KilimoSTAT, FAOSTAT, KALRO, Google Earth Engine, CHIRPS, Sentinel-2)

guides.title: How to Use ChatGPT for Your Business
guides.summary: Drafting emails, proposals, ads, social posts, and customer replies with ChatGPT. 10 copy-paste prompts included.

guides.summary: The 5 core patterns: role-play, few-shot examples, chain-of-thought, 'act as…', context + constraints. With real before/after examples.

guides.summary: Use Tidio, Landbot, Chatbase, or Botpress to build a chatbot over your own documents in under 1 hour. Step-by-step.

faqs.q: Do you work with small businesses or only enterprises?
faqs.a: Both. The AI Starter package ($1,500–$3,000) is built specifically for SMBs, micro-businesses, and solo founders. I also serve enterprises with custom multi-agent systems. Pricing scales with scope — not company size.

faqs.q: Can you build AI that works in Swahili?
faqs.a: Yes. Multilingual AI (English · Français · Kiswahili · Luganda · Amharic) is a core specialty. I built Tapi Learn (acla.io/tapi-learn) with full EN/FR/SW support and 11K+ learners across 38 countries.

faqs.q: What if I don't know what AI can do for my business?
faqs.a: Start with the AI Audit ($4,500 / KES 350K, 1–2 weeks). You'll get a prioritized roadmap with ROI models and one pilot ready to build. 50% of the audit fee is credited toward any subsequent build.
Yes. Per-project work is 50% upfront / 50% on delivery. Retainers are monthly. For startups, I offer equity-for-services (0.25–0.5% equity, 24-month vesting) alongside discounted cash.

faqs.q: Where are you based? Do you work remotely?
faqs.a: I'm based in Nairobi, Kenya. I work with clients globally (remote-first, async-friendly). For East African clients, I can do on-site workshops and kickoffs in Nairobi.

Python, TypeScript, Next.js, React, Flutter, TensorFlow Lite, PyTorch, LangChain, PostgreSQL, Prisma, n8n, Docker. For LLMs: GLM-4.6, GPT-4, Claude, Gemini, Llama — whatever fits the use case and budget.

faqs.q: How do you handle data privacy?
faqs.a: All client data is handled per Kenya Data Protection Act 2019 and GDPR. On-prem or private-cloud deployment available for sensitive workloads. No client data is used to train shared models. Full data processing agreement on retainer.

faqs.q: Can you train my team to use AI?
faqs.a: Yes. I offer half-day ($300/person) to 5-day ($18K/team) workshops. Non-technical to technical audiences. Topics include prompt engineering, RAG, multi-agent systems, MLOps, and AI ethics.
